channel.title: American Mineralogist
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in American Mineralogist

item.title: Geochemistry and mineralogy of the shale-hosted vanadium Van Property deposit, Mackenzie Mountains, Northwest Territories, Canada
item.description: Article by Caitlin Ahrens DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9359

item.title: Groundmass pyroxene crystal habits (trachts) record syneruptive magma dynamics in glassy pyroclasts
item.description: Article by Caitlin Ahrens DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9166

item.title: Transcrustal magmatic system in lamprophyre dike constructed by multiple magma reservoirs
item.description: Article by Caitlin Ahrens DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9271

item.title: Magma oxygen fugacity and volatile components control the Miocene high-Sr/Y granitoids forming either Cu or W mineralization in the Gangdese metallogenic region, Xizang, China
item.description: Article by Caitlin Ahrens DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9023

item.title: Structural variations along the apatite F-OH join: II. The role of hydrogen bonding in fluoridated teeth
item.description: Article by Caitlin Ahrens DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9393

item.title: Phase transformation of ferric-iron-rich silicate in Earth’s mid-mantle
item.description: Article by Caitlin Ahrens DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9410

item.title: Insights into the structure of disordered layered lead oxychlorides: Twinning and short-range order in janchevite, Pb9VO10.25□0.75Cl2.5
item.description: Article by Caitlin Ahrens DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9414

item.title: Coexisting hematite induces and accelerates the transformation of ferrihydrite: Pathway and underlying mechanisms
item.description: Article by Caitlin Ahrens DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9281

item.title: Interfacial structure and acidity of the orthoclase (001) surface: Understanding the effect of the surface metal cation

item.title: Mineralogical fingerprints of crustal silica contamination in the Bayan Obo carbonatite
item.description: Article by Caitlin Ahrens DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9297

item.title: The effect of the ANa-AK ratio on chlorine incorporation into hastingsitic amphiboles
item.description: Article by Caitlin Ahrens DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9083

item.title: Paulišite, Ca2Zn(CO3)3·2H2O, a new mineral with a novel crystal structure

item.title: Rubinite, Ca3Ti23+Si3O12, a new mineral in CV3 carbonaceous chondrites and a refractory garnet from the solar nebula
